header.headline: Book Your Appointment
header.description: In-person, Derry NH. Select a service, choose a Monday slot, and we'll confirm your appointment by email.

serviceStep.heading: Select a Service
serviceStep.subheading: Choose the service you need. Bring all required documents to your Monday appointment.

dateStep.heading: Choose a Monday
dateStep.subheading: Appointments are available Monday afternoons only. Select a date, then choose a time slot.

infoStep.heading: Your Information
infoStep.subheading: We'll send a confirmation to your email with the appointment details and what to bring.

confirmStep.heading: Review Your Booking
confirmStep.subheading: Confirm the details below. A confirmation email will be sent to you.
confirmStep.name: Name

doneStep.heading: Appointment Requested
doneStep.confirmationPrefix: A confirmation will be sent to
doneStep.confirmationSuffix: with your appointment details and everything you need to bring.

demo.notice: This booking system is in demo mode. Your appointment request will be followed up by email.
demo.noticeShort: Demo mode — not yet connected to live calendar
